short_summary: Iran deal close, AI restrictions, Musk trillionaire
rationale: For US residents, the near-finalized Iran deal remains the most impactful story affecting Middle East stability and oil markets; Anthropic AI suspension is a live domestic policy issue; Musk's trillionaire status is financial market noise.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal reportedly near, Lebanon strikes continue
top_events.summary: A near-finalized deal could reduce Middle East tensions and stabilize oil prices for US consumers, but ongoing Lebanon strikes and deal fragility keep uncertainty high.

top_events.title: Anthropic suspends AI tools over US government security concerns
top_events.summary: US government-ordered suspension of Anthropic AI tools for foreign nationals continues as active federal policy, signaling tightening AI security controls affecting US tech sector.

top_events.title: US kills leader of Venezuela's Tren de Aragua gang in airstrike
top_events.summary: Trump announced a US airstrike killed the leader of the Tren de Aragua gang, a domestic political win on immigration/crime but limited broader daily-life impact for most Americans.
